title: Extra Text Icons
description: This pack adds a bunch of Text Icons to Minecraft's Menus
body:
# Extra Text Icons
Extra Text Icons adds Tiny And Vanilla-Like Text Icons to many Vanilla texts.

This pack modifies Minecraft's font source by adding sprites to unspecified Unicode characters, then prepending them to text in the game's language .jsons.

**Currently (v1.3.1 for 1.21.5+ only) supported menus:**
  - World Selection and World Creation Screen
  - Server Selection Screen
  - Entire Main Options Screen
  - Edit World Screen


**Currently Supported Languages that Enable this pack:**
  - English (US)
  - English (UK/GB)
  - English (New Zealand)
  - English (Australia)
  - English (Canada)
  - More to be added
